raw_title: “There’s a Rule Book in my Head”: Journalism Ethics Meet A.I. in the Newsroom
title_en: “There’s a Rule Book in my Head”: Journalism Ethics Meet A.I. in the Newsroom
title_zh: “我脑海中有本规则手册”：新闻伦理与人工智能在新闻编辑室的相遇
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了新闻工作者如何将传统的新闻伦理规则应用于人工智能技术日益普及的新闻编辑室环境。研究关注记者们如何在面对AI工具时，运用他们内心的“规则手册”来做出伦理决策。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how journalists apply traditional ethical rules to newsroom environments where artificial intelligence technology is becoming increasingly common. The research focuses on how reporters use their internal 'rule books' to make ethical decisions when dealing with AI tools.
research_direction_zh: 探索数字新闻时代新闻伦理规范与人工智能技术融合的实践路径，研究新闻工作者如何在技术变革中维护职业伦理标准。
research_direction_en: Exploring practical pathways for integrating journalism ethics with artificial intelligence technology in the digital news era, examining how journalists maintain professional ethical standards amidst technological change.
